nasb.text: She made him sleep on her knees, and called for a man and had him shave off the seven locks of his hair. Then she began to afflict him, and his strength left him.

esv.text: She made him sleep on her knees. And she called a man and had him shave off the seven locks of his head. Then she began to torment him, and his strength left him.

cnv.text: 大利拉使參孫睡在自己的膝上，又叫了一個人來，把參孫頭上的七條髮辮都剃去；大利拉就克制了他，因他的力氣離開了他。

ccb.text: 大利拉哄参孙枕着她的腿睡觉，然后叫人来剃掉他的七根发辫，使他力气尽失，无力反抗。
